creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 153459
svn diff for net/winetd UPGRADE 1.03 --> 1.04

upgrades net/winetd from 1.03 to 1.04

Mostly code cleanup, and man page work,
changelog,...

Given I already host, and develop the
source, seems silly not to be listed
as MAINTAINER. Doesn't it? So this PR
also requests MAINTAINER(ship).

Please find the svn diff, and QA session LOG, attached,
to facilitate all this.

Thanks!

--Chris
